image_prompt_master: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface.
image_prompt_scene: scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge.
image_prompt_characters: character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand.
image_prompt_props: prop lock: Red Mug (mug_red_v1), state: being pushed, must remain visually consistent.
image_prompt_shot: shot S020. camera intent: comic_panel_03. action beats: 录像里的母亲把红杯推给孩子; 说了一句被噪声吞掉的话. narration intent: 旁白 explains "录像里的母亲把红杯推给孩子，说了一句被噪声吞掉的话。". dialogue mood: 林澈 says "她说了什么？". shot positive notes: 录像画面特写，母亲的手将红杯推给孩子，嘴唇微动，噪声干扰效果，怀旧噪点.
image_prompt_final: photographic cinematic storyboard keyframe. single static frame for a voiced comic animatic. visual style: Cinematic Realism v1. mood: cinematic, moody, controlled lighting. palette: warm highlights, cool shadows. stable character identity across shots. consistent environment layout and prop continuity. clean frame, no captions, no watermark, no user interface. scene: Apartment Kitchen Night. must keep set elements: red fridge, wooden table, rainy window. lighting: dim warm lamp + blue moonlight. match scene anchors: A wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right; B table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp; C rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge. character lock: Protagonist A (charA_v1), hair: short_black, outfit: white_hoodie + black_jeans, accessories: silver_ring_left_hand. prop lock: Red Mug (mug_red_v1), state: being pushed, must remain visually consistent. shot S020. camera intent: comic_panel_03. action beats: 录像里的母亲把红杯推给孩子; 说了一句被噪声吞掉的话. narration intent: 旁白 explains "录像里的母亲把红杯推给孩子，说了一句被噪声吞掉的话。". dialogue mood: 林澈 says "她说了什么？". shot positive notes: 录像画面特写，母亲的手将红杯推给孩子，嘴唇微动，噪声干扰效果，怀旧噪点.
negative_prompt: cartoon, neon cyberpunk (unless explicitly requested), sunlight, daylight, modern led lights, crowd, 模糊，过曝，卡通, face drift, outfit change, prop drift, wrong set layout, extra fingers, text artifacts, subtitles burned into image, logo, watermark

reference_images.note: wide shot from door, table center, red fridge left, rainy window right
table closeup with red mug and warm practical lamp
rainy window with cool blue moonlight and hallway edge

voiceover.speaker: 旁白
voiceover.text: 录像里的母亲把红杯推给孩子，说了一句被噪声吞掉的话。

manual_workflow.external_generation: paste image_prompt_final and negative_prompt into any web image/video tool; upload reference_images when supported
